# local_consistency_report = [('p256', 1, 'lamsq_row14')] (exactly one line, across the whole composite).

=== Bridge: the digest above becomes the message hash for the signature check below ===
z = digest interpreted as a 256-bit integer, reduced mod the P-256 curve order n = 24984751642085144190869367497048140084126909254632206515089679501254540427635

=== Part 2: verify a real P-256 signature fragment over that digest ===
